title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: - High: [x_poster.py#L69](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/x_poster.py#L69) still rejects empty `text`, so a post whose body is only a quote URL now fails after extraction (`clean_text == ""`) instead of posting as a quote tweet. This is a behavioral regression. - Medium: [scheduler.py#L504](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L504) detects Twitter quotes via `"twitter.com/status/"`, but normal URLs are `twitter.com/<user>/status/<id>`. The new quote-tweet path therefore misses many valid `twitter.com` links even though [x_poster.py#L14](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/x_poster.py#L14) can parse them. - Medium: no tests were added for the new quote extraction / quote-posting branch. At minimum add coverage for `x.com`, `twitter.com/<user>/status/...`, and URL-only quote posts. - No obvious new security issue in this diff.
